title: Xinnun 5 Yard Mr & Mrs Wedding Ribbon 15 mm Wide Elegant Wedding Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Cake Decoration Flower Packaging (Sliver)
features: Package Included: you will receive a roll of silver white ribbon with Mr & Mrs silver foil text; Length is about 4.57 m/ 5 yd, width is about 15 mm, you can cut it freely to the required length, very suitable for decoration of various wedding items

Material: this wedding ribbon is made of polyester material, which is tough and not easy to tear, soft and wrinkle resistant, with a smooth and shiny surface, luxurious texture, and can enhance the overall beauty of the gift

Elegant Design: this silver white wedding ribbon has the silver stamped text Mr & Mrs on the surface, and cleverly integrates two love patterns; The exquisite silver white tone is noble and elegant; The silver stamped text and love pattern add a different romantic feeling, making the gift unique in the complicated wedding; This can increase the appeal of your wedding gifts

Wide Range of Uses: this elegant wedding ribbon is very suitable for wedding gift packaging; It can also be applied as balloon decoration, bouquet decoration, wedding album decoration, homemade card decoration, wedding cake decoration or table decoration, etc., adding brilliance to your wedding in every corner

Good Choice for Wedding Gift Decoration: this elegant ribbon, with the finely printed Mr & Mrs and two love hearts, is romantic and warm, giving the gift a deeper emotional meaning, making it a unique symbol of care and blessing; This ribbon will give your wedding decoration a new highlight and become the focus of everyone's mind
